_comment: Manual metadata + optional hand-added events. This file is merged into data/events.json at runtime by docs/index.html.
data_tag_note: Manual corrections applied directly in docs/data/events.json: Auer & Co. Courtyard -> Sihlquai 131; VIOR -> Löwenstrasse 2; ROBIN's -> Zähringerstrasse 33 (venue now ROBIN's Bar & Coffee); Gleis -> Zollstrasse 121; Stubä venue label cleaned.
